reference: Hi, recently I have been feeling pain in my heart, so I went to the doctor. They did an endoscopy and confirmed it is a hiatus hernia. Now I am using Happi-D tablets in the early morning and Cinesta before lunch and dinner. Do I need to do any tests? Is it serious? How long will it take to reduce my heart pain? Please tell me, I am worried a lot. I am just twenty-two years old, female, and I have been working in a wireless company for the last year.
text: Hi, recently I have been feeling pain in my heart, so I went to the doctor. They did an endoscopy and confirmed it's a hiatus hernia. Now I am using Happi-D tablets every morning and Cenestin before lunch or dinner. Do I need to do any tests? Is it serious? How long will it take to reduce my heart pain? Please tell me, I am worried a lot. I am just 22 years old, female, and I have been working in a wireless company for the last year.
